data.title: Move OriginStory and Vision sections from Home page to Our Story page

data.body: Move the OriginStory and Vision sections (currently between Hero and HouseBannerGrid on Home.tsx) to the Our Story page (src/pages/StoryPage.tsx). Home page should go: Hero → HouseBannerGrid → Directory → Footer. Story page should incorporate these two sections as its main content.
Subsumed by FRAC-49 — the Story page gallery task explicitly incorporates moving OriginStory and Vision from Home to Story page.
